skipped_with_reason.reason: 5th sync gap candidate: feedback has probe (conf=84, gate=20%, bwr=0.637) not in LLM engine. BUT live paper trading: SOL SHORT = 34.6% WR on 52 live trades (-$176.24) CONTRADICTS backtest 63.7% WR on 179. Suspension is VALIDATED by live data. Do NOT apply. Human decision required to reconcile 52-trade live vs 179-trade backtest.

BB_solo_signal_boost (conf=95), BB_MTQ_combo_block (conf=92), ETH_SHORT_BB_golden (conf=95), BTC_BUY_BB_golden (conf=91), SOL_BUY_BB_golden (conf=90), BB_MTQ_antipattern (conf=92) — all require 'strategy=BB' condition type not supported in LLM rule schema. Architecture mismatch. Could unlock $high-edge alpha if condition schema extended.

conf=85, gate=50%, bwr=0.18 — BTC LONG 18% WR on 17 live trades. btc_trend_long_counter_v1 covers TREND regime only (-13pts). Non-trend BTC LONG is UNPROTECTED. However, n=17 live trades is small sample. Flag for human review rather than auto-applying. Potential: add conditions={symbol:BTC, side:BUY} adj=-8.0 gate=20% to cover non-trend regimes.

conf=88, bwr=0.33 on 30 trades — CONTRADICTED by 179-trade backtest WR=63.7%. Data conflict: 30 live paper trades show 33% WR vs 179-trade historical 63.7%. Both cannot be correct. Suspension already handles this. Do NOT apply hard block — it would make the data conflict irresolvable.

conf=83 — 'BTC LONG = 63.9% WR (72 trades backtest). Boost LONG.' CONTRADICTS btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (-13pts, live WR=18% on 17 trades) and live paper data. Backtest vs live conflict — live data takes precedence. SKIP.
conf=87 — DUPLICATE. hype_long_veto_v1 + hype_short_veto_v1 already veto both HYPE sides. Adding a third 'all HYPE' veto is redundant. SKIP.

auto_fix.new_finding: SOL_SHORT_LIVE_CONTRADICTION_CONFIRMED: Live paper WR=34.6% on 52 trades vs backtest 63.7% on 179 trades. Suspension is CORRECT. Cannot apply reversal probe. BB_CONDITION_UNLOCK: 6 rules (conf=90-95%) blocked by missing 'strategy' condition type in LLM rule schema — adding this one condition type could unlock multiple high-confidence rules. BTC_LONG_NONTREND_GAP: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 only covers TREND regime, leaving BTC LONG unprotected in ranging/illiquid/unknown (18% WR, 17 trades).

daily_synthesis.new_finding: BTC_LONG_NONTREND_GAP: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 conditions={symbol:BTC, side:BUY, regime:trend}. In NON-TREND regimes (ranging/illiquid/unknown), BTC LONG is UNPROTECTED despite 18% WR on 17 live trades. Consider: add btc_long_nontrend_penalize_v1 adj=-8 gate=20% conditions={symbol:BTC, side:BUY, regime:[ranging,illiquid,unknown]}. Requires: multi-value condition support OR separate rules per regime. Flag for P1 human review.

high_priority_findings.finding: SOL_SHORT_LIVE_CONTRADICTION_FINAL: Backtest claimed SOL SHORT = 63.7% WR (179 trades, +$5,807). Live paper trading shows 34.6% WR (52 trades, -$176.24). SOL SHORT suspension is VALIDATED by live data. Backtest likely includes lookahead bias or simulation artifacts. Reversal probe NOT recommended.
high_priority_findings.action: CLOSE: SOL_SHORT suspension is correct. Do not reactivate. Investigate post-restart: why does backtest show 63.7% WR when live shows 34.6%? Likely cause: slippage, timing, or survivorship bias in historical data.

high_priority_findings.finding: BB_SCHEMA_UNLOCK: 6 high-confidence BB-condition rules (conf=90-95%) are blocked by missing 'strategy' condition type in LLM rule schema. Adding one new condition key (strategy: BB/MTQ/CS/etc) to GraduatedRulesEngine.evaluate_signal() would unlock: BB_solo_signal_boost (+8pts, conf=95), ETH_SHORT_BB_golden (+boost, conf=95), BTC_BUY_BB_golden (+boost, conf=91), SOL_BUY_BB_golden (+boost, conf=90), BB_MTQ_combo_block (-10pts, conf=92). Estimated edge unlock: significant.
high_priority_findings.action: P1 dev: extend GraduatedRulesEngine.evaluate_signal() to pass strategy name in context. ~1h work in bot/llm/graduated_rules.py and bot/llm/decision_engine.py.

high_priority_findings.finding: BTC_LONG_NONTREND_GAP: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 fires only in TREND regime. BTC LONG in ranging/illiquid/unknown regime is UNPROTECTED (18% WR on 17 live trades). No rule applies outside trend. New finding this run — not previously documented.
high_priority_findings.action: HUMAN REVIEW: Apply btc_long_nontrend_penalize_v1 with adj=-8, gate=20%, conditions requiring non-trend regime. Note: current rule schema may not support multi-value regime lists — may need 3 separate rules or schema update.

high_priority_findings.finding: AB_TRACKER_DAY32_STALL: Day 32. 14 gated rules frozen with 0 outcome callbacks. Cannot graduate any rule. The entire self-improvement pipeline stalls at the final step — rules enter A/B gate but can never exit to GRADUATED or REJECTED.
high_priority_findings.action: P0 dev: implement outcome callbacks in bot/feedback/loop.py (~4h). Every day without this is another day the system cannot learn from its own decisions.

high_priority_findings.finding: SCOUT_FREQUENCY_REDUCTION: Scout agent throttle to every-3rd cycle = -67% calls, $0.048/month savings, -5% accuracy. Unchanged from prior runs.
high_priority_findings.action: P2 implement: bot/llm/agents/coordinator.py scout call counter. Post-restart.
